population.mixed_species_policy: require an explicit target species or emit a separate schedule for each species; never average different species into one hidden pulse time
population.energy_policy: consume each particle's actual velocity; kinetic energy is reported but is not converted through a hard-coded mass-energy formula

geometry.release_position_source: negative-x accelerator shield outer face plus s1_joint_contract.port_sweep.particle_release_offset_inside_outer_face_mm
geometry.finite_wall_filter: require the straight pre-pulse path to remain inside the rectangular aperture at both outer and inner shield faces
geometry.pre_pulse_field_assumption: oa accelerator electrodes are off and measured RF leakage at the source is negligible; validate the derived schedule in the actual joint model

centroid_equation.units: x in mm, vx in m/s, instrument time and pulse time in us
centroid_equation.acceptance: mean(x_i(t_pulse)) equals x_target within 1e-9 mm in the scheduler; the COMSOL validation tolerance is reported separately
